name: Jiangsu Feymer Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Feymer Technology Co., Ltd. produces and sells hydrophilic functional polymers in China. The company offers functional monomers; chemicals for water and sludge treatment, membrane, pulp and paper, mineral washing, textile printing and dyeing, and oil and gas production; and water treatment membrane products. Jiangsu Feymer Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2010 and is based in Zhangjiagang, China.
